task: legal clause extractor — pulls governing_law, parties, term_months, and effective_date from NDA-style contracts

recipes.name: legal clause extractor

default_rules.name: governing_law
default_rules.regex: governed by the laws of (?:the )?(?:State of )?([A-Z][a-zA-Z]+(?:[ ][A-Z][a-zA-Z]+)?)

input.text: governed by the laws of Delaware
